tips.online_time: ‚ÄÆOnline time refers to the game time recorded by VRCX for the current day.

prompt.title: ‚ÄÆMutual Friend Network

notifications.friend_list_changed_fetch_again: ‚ÄÆFriend list changed. Please fetch the mutual friend network again.

settings.title: ‚ÄÆGraph Layout Settings
settings.layout_iterations_help: ‚ÄÆHow long the layout runs. Higher means more stable and organized.
settings.layout_spacing_help: ‚ÄÆHow spread out the graph is. Higher means less crowded.
settings.edge_curvature_help: ‚ÄÆHow curved the lines are. Higher means smoother lines in dense areas.
settings.community_separation_help: ‚ÄÆHow far apart different communities are pushed. Higher means more distinct clusters.
settings.exclude_friends_help: ‚ÄÆSelected friends will be hidden from the graph.

context_menu.confirm_non_friend_message: ‚ÄÆThis user is no longer your friend. Do you still want to fetch their mutual friends data?
context_menu.user_opted_out: ‚ÄÆThis user has disabled mutual friends sharing. Existing data has been preserved.

tips.description: ‚ÄÆShows which worlds your friends have been visiting the most. Ranked by the number of unique friends who visited. Trend compares the first half vs second half of the selected period.

user.discord_names_description: ‚ÄÆFind the Discord usernames of your VRChat friends

export.export_notes_description: ‚ÄÆExport VRCX user memos to VRChat notes

tools.redirect_message: ‚ÄÆThis feature is now available on this page.

system_tools.registry_backup_description: ‚ÄÆCreate or restore a VRChat registry backup

vrcx_updater.updater_disabled: ‚ÄÆUpdater disabled, updates are handled by your package manager.

application.disable_gpu_acceleration_tooltip: ‚ÄÆOnly change this option if you know what you're doing, may fix issues with UI, requires restarting VRCX
application.startup_linux: ‚ÄÆAdd "--startup" arg to startup VRCX.desktop file to start VRCX minimized at system startup

favorites.header_tooltip: ‚ÄÆChoose which favorite groups are treated as VIP for filtering in Feed, Game Log, Notifications, and VR Overlay

automation.auto_state_change_tooltip: ‚ÄÆConfigure automatic status changes and invite request handling
automation.auto_state_change_switch_tooltip: ‚ÄÆAutomatically change status when there are other people in the instance (Alone / Company)
automation.auto_invite_request_accept_tooltip: ‚ÄÆAutomatically accept invite requests from favorite friends

legal_notice.info: ‚ÄÆVRCX is an assistant application for VRChat that provides information about and managing friendship. This application makes use of the unofficial VRChat API SDK.
legal_notice.disclaimer1: ‚ÄÆVRCX is not endorsed by VRChat and does not reflect the views or opinions of VRChat or anyone officially involved in producing or managing VRChat properties. VRChat and all associated properties are trademarks or registered trademarks of VRChat Inc. VRChat ¬© VRChat Inc.
legal_notice.disclaimer2: ‚ÄÆpypy & Natsumi and all contributors are not responsible for any problems caused by VRCX. Use at your own risk!

appearance.font_family_custom_invalid: ‚ÄÆInvalid font-family. Use comma-separated font names, e.g. 'My Font', Arial, sans-serif
appearance.vrcplus_profile_icons_description: ‚ÄÆUse VRChat+ exclusive profile icons when available.
appearance.age_gated_instances_description: ‚ÄÆShow age-restricted instances. When disabled, these instances are hidden and shown as restricted.
appearance.nicknames_description: ‚ÄÆShow your custom memo names after usernames.
appearance.table_page_sizes_error: ‚ÄÆPage size must be a number between 1 and 1000
appearance.toggle_pointer_on_hover_description: ‚ÄÆAlways show a pointer cursor for clickable elements.
appearance.accessible_status_indicators_description: ‚ÄÆUse shapes in addition to color to distinguish statuses.
appearance.table_entries_settings_description: ‚ÄÆControl how many items are loaded for lists and searches.

timedate.week_starts_on_description: ‚ÄÆChoose the first day of the week. Affects calendars, charts, and activity views.

user_dialog.recent_action_cooldown_description: ‚ÄÆShow a clock icon on recent invite and request actions.

user_colors.random_colors_from_user_id_description: ‚ÄÆAssign a consistent color to each user based on their ID.

steamvr_wrist_overlay.description: ‚ÄÆ* Runs automatically while VRChat is running.
steamvr_wrist_overlay.grip: ‚ÄÆGrip: Vive or Other Controllers Grab, Oculus X/A Buttons
steamvr_wrist_overlay.menu: ‚ÄÆMenu: Vive Menu, Index B, Oculus Y/B Buttons

discord_presence.description: ‚ÄÆ* Only active while in an instance.
discord_presence.enable_tooltip: ‚ÄÆDisable VRChat's Rich Presence to avoid conflicts.
discord_presence.world_integration_tooltip: ‚ÄÆShow "Watching/Listening to" for Popcorn Palace, PyPyDance, VRDancing and LS Media

relaunch_vrchat.description: ‚ÄÆAutomatically relaunch and rejoin the last instance after a crash.

auto_cache_management.description: ‚ÄÆAutomatically clean up old cache data when closing VRChat.

self_invite.description: ‚ÄÆUse self invite instead of opening the instance in VRChat.

anonymous_error_reporting.description: ‚ÄÆHelp improve VRCX by sending anonymous crash and error reports. No personal or VRChat data is collected.
anonymous_error_reporting.consent_description:
‚ÄÆAllow anonymous error reporting to help improve VRCX?

‚Ä¢ Crash and error data only
‚Ä¢ No personal or VRChat data
‚Ä¢ Nightly builds only
‚Ä¢ Can be disabled in Advanced Settings
anonymous_error_reporting.enabled_restart_description: ‚ÄÆError reporting enabled. Restart VRCX to apply changes?
anonymous_error_reporting.disabled_restart_description: ‚ÄÆError reporting disabled. Restart VRCX to apply changes?

save_instance_prints_to_file.description: ‚ÄÆSave spawned prints to your VRChat Pictures folder
save_instance_prints_to_file.crop_convert_old: ‚ÄÆWould you like to crop all prints that have already been saved?

save_instance_stickers_to_file.description: ‚ÄÆSave placed stickers to your VRChat Pictures folder

save_instance_emoji_to_file.description: ‚ÄÆSave spawned emoji to your VRChat Pictures folder

delete_all_screenshot_metadata.ask: ‚ÄÆAre you sure you want to delete all VRC & VRCX screenshot metadata from your VRChat Pictures folder?
delete_all_screenshot_metadata.confirm: ‚ÄÆDeleting all screenshot metadata is a very destructive action and cannot be undone! This includes all prints, sub folders and other unrelated images in your VRChat Pictures folder, if these photos are precious to you, please make a backup before proceeding.

remote_database.enable_description: ‚ÄÆEnables fetching avatar data from a remote database

youtube_api.enable_tooltip: ‚ÄÆFetches video titles for use with gameLog and duration for overlay progress bar

translation_api.enable_tooltip: ‚ÄÆTranslate user bios and world descriptions on demand.

launch_commands.show_confirmation_on_switch_avatar_toolt: ‚ÄÆWhen disabled, VRCX will not ask for confirmation before switching avatars.

screenshot_helper.description: ‚ÄÆEmbed world and instance data into VRChat screenshots as PNG metadata.
screenshot_helper.description_tooltip: ‚ÄÆWindows does not display PNG text metadata natively. Use tools like ExifTool or a PNG inspector to view it.
screenshot_helper.modify_filename_tooltip: ‚ÄÆWill add the World ID to screenshot filename, in addition to file metadata.

app_launcher.folder_tooltip: ‚ÄÆTo auto-launch apps with VRChat, place shortcuts inside this folder, alteratively use the platform-specific subfolders, Steam app shortcuts are also supported

database_cleanup.purge_confirm_description_1: ‚ÄÆThis will permanently delete avatar change records from the database and reclaim disk space.
database_cleanup.purge_confirm_description_3: ‚ÄÆVRCX will restart after the operation completes.
database_cleanup.purge_confirm_alert: ‚ÄÆIt is strongly recommended to back up your database file before proceeding!

user_generated_content.description: ‚ÄÆOpen or set the folder for VRChat content such as Prints and Stickers.

note_export.description1: ‚ÄÆThis process will export all of your VRCX memos and import them into VRChat notes.
note_export.description3: ‚ÄÆ- API endpoint has a rate limit that requires a large delay between requests.
note_export.description6: ‚ÄÆ- No new lines (they will replaced with a space).
note_export.description7: ‚ÄÆ- This will overwrite any existing VRChat notes for these users.
note_export.description8: ‚ÄÆ- Any edits made here wont affect VRCX memos but will affect VRChat notes once exported.

quick_search.title: ‚ÄÆQuick Search
